description: New construction of community center with covered exterior connections to existing church. FEMA funded project. Kitchen is for rewarming food only, no frying.

NEW CONSTRUCTION OF A 5-STORY, MIXED-USE BUILDING ON THE VACANT LOT. PROJECT WILL INCLUDE THREE GROUND-FLOOR COMMERCIAL TENANT SPACES, AN 18-SUITE HOTEL ON FLOORS TWO, THREE AND FOUR, AN EVENT SPACE ON THE FIFTH FLOOR, AND AN ANCILLARY PUBLIC ROOFTOP POOL AND BAR. A COMPLETE STORMWATER MANAGEMENT PLAN WILL BE IMPLEMENTED. ALL WORK TO BE DONE AS PER PLANS.

Interior structural repairs of the existing balcony as per plans. NOTE: VCC review and approval not required for interior work. Any exterior work must be submitted to VCC for review and permit prior to completion of work.
An addition to a church for a fellowship hall as per plans. No plumbing work. Hvac will be window units
